system.Text:
__When you try to persuade someone or make them an offer__, envision your approach. If you...

  * Charm, pacify, encourage, or barter: Roll +heart If you share a bond, add +1
  * Threaten or incite: Roll +iron
  * Lie or swindle: Roll +shadow

On a __strong hit__, they'll do what you want or agree to your conditions. Take +1 momentum. If you use this exchange to @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.13b2d777c6fb719d]{Gather Information}, make that move now and add +1.

On a __weak hit__, as above, but their agreement comes with a demand or complication. Envision their counteroffer.

On a __miss__, they refuse or make a demand that costs you greatly. @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.78baa51694fe37c5]{Pay the Price}.

Trigger.Text: When you try to persuade someone or make them an offer...

Strong Hit.Text: On a __strong hit__, they'll do what you want or agree to your conditions. Take +1 momentum. If you use this exchange to @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.13b2d777c6fb719d]{Gather Information}, make that move now and add +1.

Weak Hit.Text: On a __weak hit__, they'll do what you want or agree to your conditions, but their agreement comes with a demand or complication. Envision their counteroffer and take +1 momentum.

Miss.Text: On a __miss__, they refuse or make a demand that costs you greatly. @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.78baa51694fe37c5]{Pay the Price}.
